title: Chat with your tactical coach
description: Ask about leaks, ranges, positions, or request session summaries. The AI uses your imported history as context.

greeting.withData: Hello{{name}}! I analyzed your last {{hands}} hands across {{tournaments}} tournaments.{{leakNote}} Where would you like to start?
greeting.noData: No leak data yet — import tournaments to get started.
greeting.noHistory: Hello! Import tournaments so I can analyze your game and offer personalized coaching.

suggestions.title: Quick suggestions
suggestions.s1: What are my top 3 preflop leaks?
suggestions.s2: How should I adjust my SB vs BTN range?
suggestions.s3: Summarize my performance over the last 90 days
suggestions.s4: When should I 4-bet bluff in tournaments?
